documents.title: Agent Frameworks
documents.raw_content: Three sibling Rust agent frameworks: braid (multi-agent orchestration), looprs (agent loop primitives), langchainx (LangChain-style chains in Rust). praxis observes all three. Supporting projects: rslm (LLM client abstractions), bamlish (BAML structured output), mcpipe (MCP protocol proxy).

chunks.text: Three sibling Rust agent frameworks: braid (multi-agent orchestration), looprs (agent loop primitives), langchainx (LangChain-style chains in Rust). praxis observes all three. Supporting projects: rslm (LLM client abstractions), bamlish (BAML structured output), mcpipe (MCP protocol proxy).

documents.title: Agent Runtime Stack
documents.raw_content: The agentic infrastructure spans four layers, each built in Rust. Plugins: godmode, atelier, orca-strait, sanctum. Marketplace: bazaar. DSL/Runtime: crux, slashcrux. Execution: minibox, sandbox. godmode and minibox both depend on crux. slashcrux bridges slash with crux. Distributed via bazaar.

chunks.text: The agentic infrastructure spans four layers, each built in Rust. Plugins: godmode, atelier, orca-strait, sanctum. Marketplace: bazaar. DSL/Runtime: crux, slashcrux. Execution: minibox, sandbox. godmode and minibox both depend on crux. slashcrux bridges slash with crux. Distributed via bazaar.

documents.title: Hook Systems
documents.raw_content: Pre-commit, runtime, and agent hook infrastructure. coursers depends on prefixe for prefix resolution. hooklings provides a complementary hook framework. obfsck and agentlint run as lint steps in CI and pre-commit pipelines.

chunks.text: Pre-commit, runtime, and agent hook infrastructure. coursers depends on prefixe for prefix resolution. hooklings provides a complementary hook framework. obfsck and agentlint run as lint steps in CI and pre-commit pipelines.

documents.title: State Management
documents.raw_content: Session state, task tracking, and handoff continuity across agent sessions. hj is the central node: consumes task data from doob, receives collapsed state from warpx, valerie reconciles results. devkit complements doob.

chunks.text: Session state, task tracking, and handoff continuity across agent sessions. hj is the central node: consumes task data from doob, receives collapsed state from warpx, valerie reconciles results. devkit complements doob.

documents.title: Crux Pipelines
documents.raw_content: Automated pipelines for vault maintenance powered by crux DSL. Three pipelines: ingest (PROJECT notes into kgx), lint (schema validation, obfsck, agentlint), enrich (LLM-assisted relationship discovery). Cruxfile orchestrates: ci = lint + ingest, enrich depends on ingest.

chunks.text: Automated pipelines for vault maintenance powered by crux DSL. Three pipelines: ingest (PROJECT notes into kgx), lint (schema validation, obfsck, agentlint), enrich (LLM-assisted relationship discovery). Cruxfile orchestrates: ci = lint + ingest, enrich depends on ingest.

documents.title: kgx Knowledge Graph
documents.raw_content: Project metadata and relationships stored in a kgx graph at .kgx/. devobs_ingest.crux parses YAML frontmatter from PROJECT notes, creates nodes per project and edges from project_relationships. Graph queryable via kgx search, kgx bfs, kgx wiki. 17 edge types defined in project.schema.json.
